incidents.title: Order Service Returning 503 Errors
incidents.description: Multiple users are unable to complete checkout. Orders are failing to be created and the service is returning 503 responses.

incidents.title: Repeated Failed Login Attempts from Suspicious IP
incidents.description: A high number of failed login attempts are being observed from a single IP address in a very short time window using a non-browser client.

incidents.title: Deadlock Detected on Products Table
incidents.description: Two concurrent transactions are conflicting when updating the same product record simultaneously, causing one of them to be rolled back.

incidents.title: Malicious Request Patterns Detected
incidents.description: A series of suspicious requests were made from a single IP in quick succession, including attempts to access restricted admin paths and inject malicious query parameters.

incidents.title: Application Process Crashed and Restarted
incidents.description: The application process was unexpectedly terminated by the operating system and was automatically restarted. A brief period of unavailability was observed.

incidents.title: Emergency Deployment Executed with Incomplete Test Coverage
incidents.description: A manual emergency deployment was triggered to address a live production issue. Some standard pipeline validation stages were skipped to reduce deployment time.

incidents.title: Order Confirmation Emails Not Being Delivered
incidents.description: Customers are not receiving order confirmation emails after completing a purchase. The notification service is reporting failures when attempting to send via the email provider.
